# BlackLoveLink

> The premier dating platform for verified Black professionals building authentic, marriage-minded connections.

BlackLoveLink helps marriage-minded Black professionals (27+) meet verified, like-minded partners through identity verification, intentional matching, and educational content about healthy relationships.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview, mission, and how to join.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Verification process, matching, and values.
- [Success Stories](/success-stories): Real couples who met on BlackLoveLink.
- [Education](/education): Relationship guidance for Black professionals.
- [Trust & Safety](/trust-safety): Verification, encryption, and privacy controls.
- [Support](/support): FAQs and contact options.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach our Accra head office.
- [Sign In](/auth): Create an account or sign in.

- [You Are Not Looking for Love](/articles/you-are-not-looking-for-love)
- [How to Actually Enjoy the Dating Process](/articles/how-to-actually-enjoy-the-dating-process)
- [Healthy Relationship Tips](/articles/healthy-relationship-tips)
